title: cantharospermum niveum
intro: Cantharospermum niveum is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the snow white tree or the white sapindus tree. The medicinal properties of Cantharospermum niveum lie in its bark and roots, which are used to treat various health conditions due to their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Cantharospermum niveum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the dried bark and roots being used in herbal tea or added to baths for its therapeutic properties.
